scripts.bridge:check-services: cd releases/0.9/Bridge && DATABASE_URL=postgres://user:pass@localhost:5432/kenswell_one node -e "const services = require('./src/services/clientPortal'); console.log(Object.keys(services));"
scripts.bridge:check-auth: cd releases/0.9/Bridge && DATABASE_URL=postgres://user:pass@localhost:5432/kenswell_one CLIENT_PORTAL_JWT_SECRET=dev-secret node -e "const auth = require('./src/auth/clientPortal'); console.log(Object.keys(auth));"
scripts.bridge:check-workflows: cd releases/0.9/Bridge && DATABASE_URL=postgres://user:pass@localhost:5432/kenswell_one CLIENT_PORTAL_JWT_SECRET=dev-secret node -e "const workflows = require('./src/workflows/clientPortal'); console.log(Object.keys(workflows));"
scripts.bridge:check-routes: cd releases/0.9/Bridge && DATABASE_URL=postgres://user:pass@localhost:5432/kenswell_one CLIENT_PORTAL_JWT_SECRET=dev-secret node -e "const routes = require('./src/routes/clientPortal'); console.log(typeof routes); console.log(routes.stack.length);"
scripts.bridge:check-pipeline: cd releases/0.9/Bridge && DATABASE_URL=postgres://user:pass@localhost:5432/kenswell_one CLIENT_PORTAL_JWT_SECRET=dev-secret node -e "const http = require('./src/http'); const errors = require('./src/errors/ApiError'); const schemas = require('./src/validation/clientPortal'); const routes = require('./src/routes/clientPortal'); console.log(Object.keys(http)); console.log(Object.keys(errors)); console.log(Object.keys(schemas).length); console.log(routes.stack.length);"
scripts.bridge:check-audit: cd releases/0.9/Bridge && DATABASE_URL=postgres://user:pass@localhost:5432/kenswell_one CLIENT_PORTAL_JWT_SECRET=dev-secret node -e "const audit = require('./src/audit'); const repo = require('./src/repositories/audit'); console.log(Object.keys(audit)); console.log(Object.keys(repo));"
scripts.bridge:check-notifications: cd releases/0.9/Bridge && DATABASE_URL=postgres://user:pass@localhost:5432/kenswell_one CLIENT_PORTAL_JWT_SECRET=dev-secret node -e "const notifications = require('./src/notifications'); const repo = require('./src/repositories/notifications'); console.log(Object.keys(notifications)); console.log(Object.keys(repo));"
scripts.bridge:check-dashboard: cd releases/0.9/Bridge && DATABASE_URL=postgres://user:pass@localhost:5432/kenswell_one CLIENT_PORTAL_JWT_SECRET=dev-secret node -e "const dashboard = require('./src/dashboard/clientPortal'); const controllers = require('./src/controllers/clientPortal'); const routes = require('./src/routes/clientPortal/portal.routes'); console.log(Object.keys(dashboard)); console.log(Object.keys(controllers)); console.log(routes.stack.length);"
scripts.bridge:check-documents: cd releases/0.9/Bridge && DATABASE_URL=postgres://user:pass@localhost:5432/kenswell_one CLIENT_PORTAL_JWT_SECRET=dev-secret node -e "const controllers = require('./src/controllers/clientPortal'); const routes = require('./src/routes/clientPortal/document.routes'); const schemas = require('./src/validation/clientPortal'); console.log(Object.keys(controllers)); console.log(routes.stack.length); console.log(Boolean(schemas.documentIdParamSchema));"
scripts.bridge:check-messages: cd releases/0.9/Bridge && DATABASE_URL=postgres://user:pass@localhost:5432/kenswell_one CLIENT_PORTAL_JWT_SECRET=dev-secret node -e "const controllers = require('./src/controllers/clientPortal'); const routes = require('./src/routes/clientPortal/message.routes'); const schemas = require('./src/validation/clientPortal'); console.log(Object.keys(controllers)); console.log(routes.stack.length); console.log(Boolean(schemas.staffSendMessageBodySchema));"
scripts.bridge:check-timeline: cd releases/0.9/Bridge && DATABASE_URL=postgres://user:pass@localhost:5432/kenswell_one CLIENT_PORTAL_JWT_SECRET=dev-secret node -e "const timeline = require('./src/timeline/clientPortal'); const controllers = require('./src/controllers/clientPortal'); const routes = require('./src/routes/clientPortal/timeline.routes'); const schemas = require('./src/validation/clientPortal'); console.log(Object.keys(timeline)); console.log(Object.keys(controllers)); console.log(routes.stack.length); console.log(Boolean(schemas.timelineQuerySchema));"
scripts.bridge:check-files: cd releases/0.9/Bridge && DATABASE_URL=postgres://user:pass@localhost:5432/kenswell_one CLIENT_PORTAL_JWT_SECRET=dev-secret node -e "const files = require('./src/files'); const repo = require('./src/repositories/files'); const controllers = require('./src/controllers/clientPortal'); const routes = require('./src/routes/clientPortal/file.routes'); const schemas = require('./src/validation/clientPortal'); console.log(Object.keys(files)); console.log(Object.keys(repo)); console.log(Object.keys(controllers)); console.log(routes.stack.length); console.log(Boolean(schemas.prepareFileUploadBodySchema));"
scripts.bridge:check-tasks: cd releases/0.9/Bridge && DATABASE_URL=postgres://user:pass@localhost:5432/kenswell_one CLIENT_PORTAL_JWT_SECRET=dev-secret node -e "const tasks = require('./src/tasks/clientPortal'); const repo = require('./src/repositories/tasks'); const controllers = require('./src/controllers/clientPortal'); const routes = require('./src/routes/clientPortal/task.routes'); const schemas = require('./src/validation/clientPortal'); console.log(Object.keys(tasks)); console.log(Object.keys(repo)); console.log(Object.keys(controllers)); console.log(routes.stack.length); console.log(Boolean(schemas.createClientTaskBodySchema));"
scripts.bridge:check-approvals: cd releases/0.9/Bridge && DATABASE_URL=postgres://user:pass@localhost:5432/kenswell_one CLIENT_PORTAL_JWT_SECRET=dev-secret node -e "const approvals = require('./src/approvals/clientPortal'); const repo = require('./src/repositories/approvals'); const controllers = require('./src/controllers/clientPortal'); const routes = require('./src/routes/clientPortal/approval.routes'); const schemas = require('./src/validation/clientPortal'); console.log(Object.keys(approvals)); console.log(Object.keys(repo)); console.log(Object.keys(controllers)); console.log(routes.stack.length); console.log(Boolean(schemas.createClientApprovalBodySchema));"
scripts.bridge:check-activity: cd releases/0.9/Bridge && DATABASE_URL=postgres://user:pass@localhost:5432/kenswell_one CLIENT_PORTAL_JWT_SECRET=dev-secret node -e "const activity = require('./src/activity/clientPortal'); const controllers = require('./src/controllers/clientPortal'); const routes = require('./src/routes/clientPortal/activity.routes'); const schemas = require('./src/validation/clientPortal'); console.log(Object.keys(activity)); console.log(Object.keys(controllers)); console.log(routes.stack.length); console.log(Boolean(schemas.activityQuerySchema));"
scripts.bridge:check-client-portal: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const required = ['releases/0.9/Bridge/apps/client-portal/src/App.jsx','releases/0.9/Bridge/apps/client-portal/src/layouts/ClientPortalLayout.jsx','releases/0.9/Bridge/apps/client-portal/src/pages/DashboardPage.jsx']; required.forEach((file) => { if (!fs.existsSync(file)) throw new Error(file + ' missing'); }); console.log('client portal shell ready');"
scripts.bridge:client-portal:verify-deploy: cd releases/0.9/Bridge/apps/client-portal && npm run build && node deploy/verify-build.js
scripts.bridge:rc1:smoke: npm run bridge:check-routes && npm run bridge:check-dashboard && npm run bridge:check-documents && npm run bridge:check-messages && npm run bridge:check-tasks && npm run bridge:check-approvals && npm run bridge:check-activity && npm run bridge:check-files && npm run bridge:client-portal:build
scripts.bridge:rc3:ga: npm run bridge:rc3:readiness && npm run bridge:rc2:ci && npm run bridge:rc1:smoke-full
scripts.enterprise:1.0:verify: npm run enterprise:1.0:a1 && npm run enterprise:1.0:a2 && npm run enterprise:1.0:a3 && npm run enterprise:1.0:a4 && npm run enterprise:1.0:a5 && npm run enterprise:1.0:b1 && npm run enterprise:1.0:b2 && npm run enterprise:1.0:b3 && npm run enterprise:1.0:b4 && npm run enterprise:1.0:b5 && npm run enterprise:1.0:b6 && npm run enterprise:1.0:b7 && npm run enterprise:1.0:b8 && npm run enterprise:1.0:b9 && npm run enterprise:1.0:b10 && npm run enterprise:1.0:b11
